title: The Screw_Potato Mod
description: A mod made based on the Screw_Potato community
body:
This is a mod focused around the twitch streamer Screw_Potato. The mod includes references to his stream and inside jokes. All of the items and other stuff in the mod is associated with the streamer himself and the community.

 

This is not a mod made by Screw_Potato himself but by one of his mods.

I want to add more content to the mod, so please come with ideas to stuff i can add or join the Screw_Fries discord server and come with suggestions there.

Link to discord server https://discord.gg/gRvDkA8
